brand.name: NURA
brand.footerCopy: NURA is a contemporary boho crystal jewellery brand creating pieces for everyday wear, special occasions and meaningful gifting. Designed to be worn, loved and lived in.

seo.title: NURA Jewellery | Contemporary Boho Crystal Jewellery for Everyday Wear
seo.description: Shop NURA contemporary boho crystal jewellery designed to be worn, loved and lived in. Explore necklaces, bracelets, earrings, pendants and meaningful gift-ready pieces for everyday wear and special occasions.
seo.keywords: NURA jewellery, contemporary boho crystal jewellery, crystal jewellery India, everyday crystal jewellery, boho necklaces, crystal bracelets, crystal earrings, meaningful jewellery gifts

hero.title: Jewellery designed to be worn, loved and lived in.
hero.copy: NURA creates crystal-led jewellery for everyday styling, special occasions and meaningful gifting. Explore boho necklaces, bracelets, earrings, pendants and curated pieces made to carry beauty, intention and personal expression.

slides.title: Noir Fan Collar
slides.copy: A dark stone-detail necklace for layered looks, evening styling and expressive everyday wear.

slides.title: Citrine Garden Necklace
slides.copy: Warm yellow stones and boho styling for birthdays, celebrations and meaningful gifting.

slides.title: Rose Drape Set
slides.copy: Layered rose-tone details with an easy special-occasion silhouette.

marquee: Designed to be worn, loved and lived in

cards.title: Wearable
cards.copy: Pieces are chosen for daily styling, layering and special moments, so jewellery can move naturally through real life.

cards.title: Meaningful
cards.copy: NURA uses crystal symbolism and intention-led language as a personal lifestyle expression, not as medical advice.

cards.title: Expressive
cards.copy: Colour, form, mood and styling help every piece feel personal, gift-ready and easy to connect with.

collections.title: Everyday Crystal Pieces
collections.copy: Easy-to-style jewellery for daily wear, layering and quiet personal meaning.

collections.title: Occasion & Gift Edits
collections.copy: Crystal-led pieces for birthdays, celebrations, festive outfits and thoughtful gifting.

collections.title: For Healers & Intention Wearers
collections.copy: Symbolic jewellery for people drawn to crystals, energy work, manifestation and mindful styling.

process.title: Selected, styled and shared with intention.

steps.title: Select
steps.copy: Crystal-led and boho-inspired pieces are chosen for their look, feel and everyday wearability.

steps.title: Style
steps.copy: Jewellery is arranged into daily, occasion, gifting and intention-led edits so customers can shop by mood.

steps.title: Share
steps.copy: Customers can explore, save, order and confirm details directly through WhatsApp.

atelier.title: Beauty, mood and intention in one wearable piece.
atelier.copy: NURA welcomes people who connect with crystals, energy, manifestation and emotional meaning. The jewellery is wearable symbolism for those who like their accessories to carry beauty, mood and intention.

services.title: WhatsApp Ordering
services.copy: Customers can send their name, phone number, delivery location, product links, quantity and total directly to NURA on WhatsApp.

services.title: UPI Payment Ready
services.copy: The cart includes a direct UPI payment section with an editable QR image and UPI ID configuration for India.

services.title: Easy Product Updates
services.copy: Add, remove or edit jewellery by changing product objects in products.json and placing photos in the product image folder.

trust.title: Trust grows through real products, process and customer moments.
trust.copy: NURA's content pillars include products, process, display, behind-the-scenes moments, happy customers and happy faces. Add real customer photos, order screenshots, display images and short customer notes here as they become available.

faqs.question: How do I place an order?
faqs.answer: Add pieces to your bag, enter your details and send the order summary to NURA on WhatsApp for confirmation.

faqs.question: Is NURA jewellery for everyday wear?
faqs.answer: Yes. NURA's brand direction is built around crystal jewellery designed to be worn, loved and lived in.

faqs.question: Are all pieces genuine crystal?
faqs.answer: Some NURA pieces may use crystal or stone details, but each product should be checked individually. Product material details are listed clearly before purchase.

faqs.question: Can I buy jewellery as a gift?
faqs.answer: Yes. NURA pieces are suitable for meaningful gifting, special occasions and personal styling.

faqs.question: Is crystal jewellery a medical or healing treatment?
faqs.answer: No. NURA uses crystal meaning and intention as symbolic lifestyle language, not as medical advice or treatment.
